name: Kung Pao Chi (Chicken with Chilies and Nuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken, 4 tablespoons soy sauce, cold water, cornstarch, and garlic salt in a bowl. Stir evenly in one direction and let marinate for 30 minutes.
2. Remove tips and seeds from chiles, then cut into 1-inch pieces.
3. Combine remaining 2 tablespoons soy sauce, white wine or sherry, sugar, 1 teaspoon cornstarch, salt, and sesame oil in a small bowl.
4. Heat oil in a wok to 400°F (204°C).
5. Add chicken and fry for 30 seconds. Remove chicken and drain off all but 2 tablespoons oil.
6. Heat oil and fry chiles until black.
7. Add ginger root and chicken, stirring and tossing together.
8. Add soy-wine mixture and cook, stirring, just until thickened.
9. Remove from heat and sprinkle with nuts.
